name: Mutual NDA
description: A mutual non-disclosure agreement for two parties sharing confidential information.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard terms for providing cloud-hosted SaaS products to customers.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An early-access agreement for design partners providing feedback on a product.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Defines uptime commitments, incident response times, and service credits.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-compliant DPA covering data processing, sub-processors, and SCCs.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA BAA governing the handling of protected health information (PHI).

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum covering AI/ML service terms including input, output, and model training.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Terms for delivering professional or consulting services under statements of work.

name: Software License Agreement
description: On-premise software license covering installation, use rights, and restrictions.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Governs referral and reseller partnerships including fees and responsibilities.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term pilot or proof-of-concept access agreement prior to a full contract.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template to pair with the Mutual NDA standard terms.
